п»ї---
title: 'Writing Practice 01/02/2025 | Angst the happy dragon'
date: '2025-01-02T18:00:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5675057188346894772'
blogger_filename: '/2025/01/writing-practice-01022025-angst-happy.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Writing Practice'
---

<p>*From a conversation about a book Preston was readingГўв‚¬В¦ this phrase came up. Good prompt.</p>
<p>How does one get ready for their appointment with God?</p>
<hr />
<hr />
<hr />
<hr />
<hr />
<p>Гўв‚¬Е“How does one get ready for their appointment with a god?Гўв‚¬Вќ LГўв‚¬в„ўAng asked. He turned to his dragon, waiting for a response.</p>
<p>Angst, the tiny pet dragon, sat on his perch near the window, soaking the rare winter sunshine through the window. He nodded thoughtfully for a moment. Гўв‚¬Е“I see your predicament. ItГўв‚¬в„ўs not an entirely uncommon experience, but itГўв‚¬в„ўs not exactly a daily experience either. What does one say, Гўв‚¬ЛњHowdy there diety, howГўв‚¬в„ўs the weather?Гўв‚¬в„ў That would seem an odd start, indeed.Гўв‚¬Вќ Angst the dragon smiled to himself, amused at the idea.</p>
<p>LГўв‚¬в„ўAng crossed the room to stand next to Angst, intending to look out the window, but he caught his own reflection instead. He began fussing over the grey hairs beginning to shoot up in his otherwise jet black hair. Гўв‚¬Е“IГўв‚¬в„ўm not sure what one is to say to a godГўв‚¬В¦ Or, for that matter, why he wants to see meГўв‚¬В¦ me of all people.Гўв‚¬Вќ</p>
<p>Гўв‚¬Е“You fuss too much,Гўв‚¬Вќ Angst said, then shook his wings and stretch them before hopping onto LГўв‚¬в„ўAngs shoulder. Гўв‚¬Е“LetГўв‚¬в„ўs go outside and take a walk, that seems to help you regulate.Гўв‚¬Вќ</p>
<p>Гўв‚¬Е“YouГўв‚¬в„ўre a good friend, Angst.Гўв‚¬Вќ LГўв‚¬в„ўAng replied, and then walked outside to the path leading into the forest.</p>
<!-- notionvc: 1e11b263-fc6f-43c5-9cfa-ec3a80d2e4c2 -->
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="https://darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=14df3ba97b" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
<label>Subscribe Now - Pursue a No Hiding Lifestyle</label>&nbsp;<input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" required="" type="email" value="" /><br />
<div aria-hidden="true" style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_14df3ba97b" tabindex="-1" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</div>
</form>
</div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe (DG Wolfe)</span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant @&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about_12.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/" target="_blank">Clifton StrengthsFinder</a>: Intellection, Learner,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Ideation,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">&nbsp;Achiever, Input</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">16Personalities</a> (Myers-Briggs Type): INFJ</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span></div>
